title: Modern Web Security Patterns
author: Jane Smith
abstract: This paper reviews common web vulnerabilities and proposes secure-by-design patterns for modern web applications.

title: Progressive Web Apps for Offline Learning
author: Ali Khan
abstract: We present a working group proposal to explore PWA features for offline-first education platforms.

title: Optimising React Performance
author: Mia Chen
abstract: A poster summarising practical techniques to reduce re-renders and improve perceived performance in React apps.

title: Human-centred AI Interfaces

abstract: Doctoral consortium submission focusing on evaluation methods for human-centred AI interface design.

title: Teaching Git with Micro-projects

abstract: Courseware tips for teaching Git using short micro-projects and peer feedback cycles.

title: Introduction to Artificial Intelligence

abstract: Courseware tips for teaching Git using short micro-projects and peer feedback cycles.
